docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILENSKY, VARDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBAUM, BENJAMIN $1,685.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF VARDA WILENSKY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BENJAMIN ALBAUM IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILENSKY, VARDA AS TO DEFENDANT ALBAUM, BENJAMIN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $285.01 AS TO DEFENDANT ALBAUM, BENJAMIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,792.20 FILED BY WILENSKY, VARDA AS TO DEFENDANT ALBAUM, BENJAMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAR-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALBAUM, BENJAMIN
